# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- Syntax highlighting for scripted SQL definitions in SqlPhanos is mandatory. Avalonia is preferred for the implementation, but not required if another approach is more reliable.
- For SqlTools modernization work: remove ReactiveUI, use only CommunityToolkit.Mvvm patterns in the UI layer, target .NET 10, and use only official Avalonia NuGet packages instead of local or forked Avalonia code.
